questions.question: What does HDL primarily stand for in the context of digital circuit design?
options: Hardware Design Language
High-level Development Logic
Hardware Description Language
Hierarchical Digital Layer
Hard Drive Logic

questions.question: In digital IC design, which phase involves mapping the Register Transfer Level (RTL) design to a gate-level netlist using a specific technology library of standard cells?
options: Physical Verification
Logic Synthesis
Static Timing Analysis
Place and Route
Functional Simulation

questions.question: What is the primary function of a Translation Lookaside Buffer (TLB) in a computer system?
options: To store recently executed instructions for faster re-execution
To accelerate the translation of virtual memory addresses to physical memory addresses
To manage the order of instruction execution in an out-of-order processor
To provide temporary storage for CPU registers during context switching
To buffer I/O requests before they are sent to peripheral devices

questions.question: In high-performance Integrated Circuit (IC) design, what primary issue does "IR drop" analysis aim to identify and mitigate?
options: Excessive temperature rise due to localized power dissipation in the silicon
Variability in transistor threshold voltages across the entire chip due to manufacturing process fluctuations
Voltage fluctuations on the on-chip power supply network caused by current flow through resistive interconnects
Signal integrity issues such as crosstalk between adjacent routing wires
Manufacturing defects related to lithography masks causing short circuits or opens

questions.question: In modern processor architectures, what is the primary benefit achieved by implementing Simultaneous Multithreading (SMT), often marketed as Hyper-Threading by Intel?
options: Reducing the number of pipeline stages to achieve higher clock frequencies
Allowing multiple independent processors to share a single main memory module without contention
Improving processor utilization by executing instructions from multiple independent threads concurrently on a single physical execution core
Enabling dynamic adjustment of the processor's operating voltage and frequency for power efficiency
Providing hardware-level isolation and security between different virtual machines running on the same host
